Do NOT auto-rewrite a legal claim on our one winning page from ambiguous secondary snippets — risk of introducing inaccuracy. Verify against the enrolled SB 26-189 bill text, then reconcile llms.txt, llms-full.txt, and /blog/ai-compliance-colorado-eu-small-business-2026.
